complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Initialize Project Repository and Development Environment
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the repository initialization task into specific steps for creating the Git repository, setting up Node.js with pnpm workspace, configuring the monorepo structure, setting up VS Code workspace, and implementing Git hooks.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves several distinct setup operations that are well-defined and mostly independent. The complexity is moderate due to the need to configure multiple tools and ensure they work together correctly.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Configure Next.js 14 with App Router and TypeScript
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the Next.js configuration task into subtasks for installation, TypeScript setup, next.config.js configuration, path mapping setup, experimental features enablement, and initial testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task requires configuring multiple aspects of Next.js with specific version requirements and experimental features. The interdependencies between configuration options increase complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Integrate Tailwind CSS and Design System Foundation
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the Tailwind CSS integration into subtasks for installation, color palette configuration, typography settings, responsive breakpoints, CSS custom properties, theme switching, and accessibility preferences.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Creating a custom design system with Tailwind involves multiple configuration aspects and requires careful consideration of theming, responsiveness, and accessibility, increasing the overall complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Install and Configure shadcn/ui Component Library
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the shadcn/ui setup into subtasks for initialization, theme token configuration, component installation, style customization, documentation setup, and accessibility testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves integrating and customizing a component library with specific requirements for accessibility and design system alignment. The customization aspects increase complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the MDX pipeline configuration into subtasks for installing dependencies, setting up frontmatter parsing, configuring remark/rehype plugins, creating component mappings, implementing content validation, enabling syntax highlighting, testing the pipeline, and documentation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: MDX processing involves multiple plugins and configuration options with complex interdependencies. Content validation and custom component mapping add significant complexity to this task.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement Content File Structure and Organization
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the content structure implementation into subtasks for directory creation, TypeScript interface definition for each content type, metadata schema creation, validation setup, slug generation, and testing with sample content.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task requires designing and implementing a structured content organization system with proper validation. The complexity comes from defining appropriate schemas for different content types.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the layout component creation into subtasks for header implementation, mobile navigation, footer development, main layout wrapper, semantic HTML structure, accessibility landmarks, and responsive testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Creating responsive layout components with proper semantic structure and accessibility requires careful implementation and testing across multiple breakpoints, increasing complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the homepage development into subtasks for hero section, impact metrics dashboard, content classification UI, categorized content listings, newsletter signup integration, donation CTAs, responsive layout, and testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: The homepage combines multiple complex components and requires integration with content classification systems and metrics. The variety of elements and their interactions increase complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Create Blog Post Detail Page with MDX Rendering
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the blog post page creation into subtasks for dynamic routing, MDX rendering implementation, custom component integration, content classification warnings, age verification, reading time calculation, social sharing, related content, and responsive testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves complex dynamic routing, MDX rendering with custom components, and multiple interactive features. The content classification integration adds significant complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the classification system implementation into subtasks for content warning component, progressive disclosure mechanism, age verification modal, classification badge system, content filtering, user preference storage, sharing controls, testing, and documentation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves creating a sophisticated content classification system with multiple interactive components and user preference management. The progressive disclosure and verification flows add significant complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Configure Image Optimization and Gallery Components
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the image optimization task into subtasks for next/image configuration, custom loader implementation, gallery component creation, lightbox functionality, before/after slider implementation, format conversion setup, responsive sizing, and lazy loading.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Image optimization involves multiple technical aspects including format conversion, responsive sizing, and interactive components like galleries and sliders, increasing implementation complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Build SEO Foundation with Meta Tags and Structured Data
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the SEO implementation into subtasks for dynamic meta tag generation, Open Graph optimization, Twitter Card setup, JSON-LD structured data, sitemap generation, robots.txt configuration, and canonical URL implementation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: SEO implementation requires attention to multiple metadata formats and structured data types. The dynamic generation based on content adds complexity to this task.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the search implementation into subtasks for Fuse.js installation, search index creation, search dialog component, keyboard shortcut implementation, result highlighting, content filtering, recent searches feature, and analytics integration.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Search functionality involves complex index creation, result highlighting, and multiple interactive features. The need for performance optimization with large content volumes increases complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the newsletter signup implementation into subtasks for component creation, email validation, API integration, subscriber segmentation, GDPR compliance features, double opt-in flow, and state handling.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves form validation, API integration, and compliance requirements. The subscriber segmentation and GDPR features add complexity to what might otherwise be a simpler task.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the donation integration into subtasks for button and modal components, Stripe integration, PayPal integration, emergency appeal banner, donation amount suggestions, recurring donation options, impact calculators, testing, and analytics.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Payment integrations are inherently complex with multiple providers and flows. The additional features like emergency appeals and impact calculators further increase the implementation complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the impact dashboard development into subtasks for animated counter implementation, progress bar creation, real-time data integration, geographic mapping, timeline visualization, transparency indicators, verification badges, and testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves data visualization, real-time updates, and geographic mapping. The integration with external data sources and animated visualizations increase implementation complexity.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the social sharing implementation into subtasks for component creation, platform-specific optimizations, Open Graph image generation, analytics tracking, content restriction logic, emergency appeal amplification, testing, and documentation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Social sharing requires platform-specific implementations and dynamic image generation. The content restrictions and emergency features add complexity to the basic sharing functionality.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the analytics configuration into subtasks for Vercel Analytics setup, Google Analytics 4 integration, custom event tracking, Core Web Vitals monitoring, performance budget implementation, alert configuration, testing, and documentation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves integrating multiple analytics platforms and implementing custom tracking. The performance monitoring and alerting add complexity to the basic analytics setup.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the content workflow implementation into subtasks for GitHub Actions configuration, content validation automation, preview deployment setup, approval workflow, review assignment logic, content enhancement automation, publication scheduling, and testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Creating a Git-based content workflow involves complex automation and approval processes. The classification-based routing and automated enhancements increase implementation complexity.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement Error Handling and Fallback Pages
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the error handling implementation into subtasks for custom 404 page, 500 error page, React error boundaries, graceful degradation, offline support with service worker, testing, and documentation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Error handling requires implementing multiple fallback mechanisms and graceful degradation. The offline support adds some complexity but the overall task is relatively straightforward.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the security configuration into subtasks for header setup in next.config.js, Content Security Policy implementation, nonce-based script execution, Subresource Integrity, Dependabot configuration, testing, documentation, and security scanning.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Security configuration requires detailed knowledge of headers and CSP. The nonce-based script execution and SRI implementation add significant complexity to this task.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the comment system implementation into subtasks for Giscus setup, GitHub Discussions configuration, moderation settings, comment threading, reaction implementation, notification system, community management features, and testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Comment system integration involves third-party services and moderation features. The notification system and community management add complexity to the basic integration.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the RSS implementation into subtasks for feed generator creation, content classification filtering, multiple feed type setup, podcast RSS support, XML formatting, media enclosure handling, and testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: RSS feed generation is relatively straightforward but requires proper XML formatting and content filtering. The podcast support adds some complexity to the basic implementation.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the recommendation system implementation into subtasks for similarity algorithm development, component creation, engagement tracking, user behavior analysis, personalization features, classification awareness, testing, and performance optimization.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Content recommendation involves complex algorithms and user behavior analysis. The personalization features and classification awareness add significant complexity to this task.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the accessibility implementation into subtasks for skip navigation, ARIA labels and landmarks, keyboard navigation, high contrast mode, automated testing setup, manual testing procedures, documentation, and content creator guidelines.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Ensuring WCAG compliance requires comprehensive testing and implementation across all components. The high contrast mode and testing procedures add complexity to this critical task.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the deployment configuration into subtasks for Vercel project setup, GitHub integration, environment variable configuration, domain setup, SSL certificate installation, preview deployment configuration, and production deployment automation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Deployment configuration involves multiple settings and environment variables. The preview deployments and production optimization add some complexity but the task is relatively straightforward with Vercel.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the performance optimization into subtasks for bundle analyzer setup, JavaScript optimization, caching strategy implementation, service worker configuration, performance budget setup, Lighthouse testing automation, regression prevention, and documentation.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Performance optimization requires detailed analysis and multiple optimization techniques. The automated testing and regression prevention add complexity to this technical task.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the documentation creation into subtasks for MDX writing guide, component examples, classification guidelines, approval workflow documentation, style guide, video tutorial production, and user testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Documentation requires comprehensive coverage of multiple aspects but is relatively straightforward. The video tutorials add some complexity to the basic documentation task.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the emergency appeal implementation into subtasks for component creation, countdown timer, progress indicators, notification system, email integration, social media integration, rapid deployment bypass, analytics setup, and testing.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Emergency appeal functionality involves time-sensitive features and multiple integrations. The notification system and rapid deployment bypass add significant complexity to this critical feature.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Conduct Final Testing and Launch Preparation
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Divide the final testing into subtasks for cross-browser compatibility testing, mobile device testing, accessibility compliance verification, performance benchmarking, security audit, integration validation, launch checklist creation, rollback procedure documentation, final review, and deployment.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: Final testing requires comprehensive validation across all aspects of the application. The security audit, performance benchmarking, and rollback procedures make this a highly complex task with many interdependencies.
